title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents fail in practice because the industry has normalized unreliability, with errors compounding rapidly across multi-step workflows even at 90% per-step accuracy. He emphasizes that shipping agents that work reliably requires prioritizing reliability over raw performance and building taste through continuous dogfooding practices.
